description: Seeking to recoup expenses for excess cargo units procured for the ill-fated production of the RF-72m, Ryokka rushed the TR-41n through the design phase in record time. Little more than a tug with a single Mobile Space Systems-manufactured cargo unit bolted to the front, the model nonetheless proved popular as an affordable way to move large amounts of cargo over short distances.
